title: Alpha
description: Introduces three-level hierarchy (Intent / Cycle / Iteration) with revised gate behavior — Gate 2 becomes a human-reviewable iteration loop, Gate 3 no longer closes the intent, and intent completion is an explicit PO signal-confirmation action.
highlights: Three-level model: Intent (outcome goal) → Cycle (delivery unit) → Iteration (implementation pass)
Intent lifecycle: open → in-progress → monitoring → completed (Gate 3 no longer closes the intent)
Gate 2 renamed to Iteration Review Gate — human reviewer can approve or request iteration with feedback
New artifact: Iteration Record (trigger, feedback, task list, status)
Intent Completion added as explicit PO signal-confirmation event in Section 06
Role updates: PO owns intent lifecycle; Orchestrator creates Iterations; QA/Craft Eng own Gate 2 decision
